results.requirement_text: The system shall prevent users without administrator permission from opening the user management page.

test_cases.title: Prevent non‑admin users from opening the user management page
test_cases.objective: Verify that a user lacking administrator permission is denied access to the user management page.
preconditions: A user without administrator permission is available.

steps.action: Attempt to open the user management page as a user without administrator permission.
steps.expected_result: Access is denied and the user management page is not opened.

test_cases.expected_result: Access is denied and the user management page is not opened.
assumptions: The existence of a user without administrator permission is assumed.

traceability.coverage_item: System enforces that users without administrator permission cannot open the user management page.

source_basis: prevent users without administrator permission from opening the user management page

plans.requirement_text: The system shall prevent users without administrator permission from opening the user management page.

coverage_items.coverage_item: System enforces that users without administrator permission cannot open the user management page.
coverage_items.rationale: Verify that the access control prevents unauthorized users from accessing the page.
source_basis: prevent users without administrator permission from opening the user management page
